base_url.label: API Base URL
base_url.help_editable: Custom API base URL. Leave empty to use the default URL.
base_url.help_readonly: The API base URL for this channel type is fixed and cannot be modified.

models.label: Supported Model Names *
models.help_curated: These are recommended model names for this channel type. You can add the full provider catalog or custom model names below.
models.help_catalog: These are known model names for this channel type. You can also add custom model names if your upstream supports them.
models.explainer_curated: This channel type has {{recommendedCount}} recommended model names. If you need the broader upstream list, use "Add Provider Catalog" to import all {{catalogCount}} known model names.
models.explainer_catalog: This channel type uses the provider catalog directly. You can import all {{catalogCount}} known model names or add custom names manually.
models.recommended_description: A smaller curated list for common setups. Use this when you want a cleaner starting point.
models.catalog_description: All model names currently known for this provider type. Import this when you need the full catalog instead of the curated subset.

model_mapping.label: Request Model Mapping (JSON)
model_mapping.help: Optional. Only use this when the client-facing model name should be translated to a different upstream model name.
model_mapping.placeholder:
JSON object mapping request model names to upstream model names:
{{example}}

model_configs.label: Per-Model Pricing & Limits (JSON)
model_configs.help: Optional overrides for ratio, completion_ratio, and max_tokens. This does not control which model names are enabled above.
model_configs.no_defaults_message: No provider default pricing was found for the currently selected models.
model_configs.placeholder:
JSON object for per-model pricing and token limits:
{{example}}

name.label: Channel Name *
name.help: A descriptive name for this channel to identify it in logs and lists.

type.label: Channel Type *
type.help: The provider type for this channel. Changing this may reset some fields.

groups.label: Groups *
groups.help: User groups that can access this channel. "default" is standard for normal users.

key.label: API Key
key.help: The API key for authentication with the provider.

base_url.label: Base URL *
base_url.help: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible endpoint, e.g., https://api.your-provider.com. /v1 is appended automatically when required.

api_format.label: Upstream API Format *
api_format.help: Select which upstream API surface should handle requests. ChatCompletion is the historical default; choose Response when the upstream expects OpenAI Response API payloads.

priority.label: Priority
priority.help: Higher priority channels are tried first. Default is 0.

weight.label: Weight
weight.help: Used for load balancing between channels of the same priority. Default is 0.

ratelimit.label: Rate Limit
ratelimit.help: Maximum requests per minute. 0 means unlimited.

system_prompt.label: System Prompt
system_prompt.help: Force a system prompt for all requests to this channel.

tooling.label: Tooling Config
tooling.help: Configure allowed tools and their pricing (JSON).
tooling.editor_disabled: Fix JSON error to enable editor

errors.invalid_json_message: Fix tooling JSON before editing the whitelist.

endpoints.label: Supported Endpoints
endpoints.help: Select which API endpoints this channel supports. Click on an endpoint's info icon for details and usage examples.

mcp.blacklist_description: Block MCP tools for this channel. Use server.tool or tool name.

type_change.title: Change Channel Type?
type_change.description: You are about to change the channel type from "{{fromType}}" to "{{toType}}".

validation.inference_profile_invalid: Inference profile ARN map has invalid JSON.
validation.oauth_invalid_json: OAuth JWT configuration JSON is invalid.
validation.endpoints_required: Enable at least one endpoint before saving.
validation.base_url_required: Base URL is required for this channel type.

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.help: The API key for authentication with the provider.

region.label: Region
region.help: The region for the cloud provider.
